multi_granularity_preference.purpose: Score why the chosen answer beats the rejected answer instead of storing only a binary label.

geometric_mean_reward_stabilization.purpose: Suppress one-off reward spikes before future GRPO-style loops.

curriculum_difficulty_scheduling.purpose: Keep hard examples from overwhelming the early adapter.

training_boundary.rule: Preference rows are chosen/rejected pairs and should not be mixed into SFT-only Kaggle rounds.
